description: Cold email outreach templates by service angle — Aixer Solutions
rules: Always open with a SPECIFIC fact about the company — never a generic opener
Reference the exact signal that triggered interest (numbers, dates)
Name one specific pain point, not vague 'inefficiency'
Propose ONE service, not a menu
End with a micro-offer: 15-min call or 2-page audit
Use verified decision-maker's first name only
Tone: consultant peer-to-peer, not vendor pitch
Do NOT use: 'leverage', 'synergy', 'cutting-edge', 'game-changer', 'I hope this finds you well'

variable_guide.{recent_signal}: Specific recent event (hiring numbers, funding, expansion news)
variable_guide.{volume_metric}: A specific operational metric (orders/day, customers, SKUs)

process_automation.trigger: Operational headcount growing faster than revenue; manual process bottleneck
subject_variants: How {company} can handle 3x volume without adding headcount
{recent_signal_hook} — something we can fix in 6 weeks
process_automation.body:
Hi {first_name},

I noticed {company} {recent_signal} — that's usually a strong signal that manual processes are becoming the constraint on growth.

We work with Singapore {sector} companies to automate {pain_point} using coordinated AI agents, typically cutting operational overhead by 25–40% within 8 weeks.

Would a 15-minute call this week to show you what's possible be worth your time?

Best,
Hon Mun
Aixer Solutions | hmchan@aixers.com

supply_chain_visibility.trigger: Logistics or inventory challenges; warehouse expansion; new distribution points
subject_variants: {company}'s supply chain blind spots — quick fix available
How we helped a Singapore {sector} company cut stockouts by 60%
supply_chain_visibility.body:
Hi {first_name},

Saw that {company} {recent_signal} — at that scale, supply chain visibility usually becomes the bottleneck before anything else does.

We build AI systems for Singapore {sector} companies that deliver real-time inventory and demand forecasting without the enterprise ERP price tag or 18-month timeline.

Open to a 15-minute walkthrough of what this looks like in practice?

Best,
Hon Mun
Aixer Solutions | hmchan@aixers.com

customer_ai.trigger: High customer volume; B2C or e-commerce growth; customer support team hiring
subject_variants: Handling {company}'s customer volume without proportional headcount
Reducing {company}'s support tickets by 60% — here's how
customer_ai.body:
Hi {first_name},

Noticed {company} {recent_signal} — growing customer volume at that pace usually means support costs are climbing in parallel.

We help Singapore {sector} companies deploy AI agents that handle 60–80% of customer queries automatically, freeing the team for complex and high-value interactions.

Would a 2-page automation audit of your customer journey be useful? Happy to put one together.

Best,
Hon Mun
Aixer Solutions | hmchan@aixers.com

multi_agent_orchestration.trigger: Complex cross-department workflows; coordination overhead; rapid scaling across functions
subject_variants: Coordinating {company}'s ops, sales, and finance without the overhead
How we cut cross-team coordination time by 50% for a Singapore {sector} company
multi_agent_orchestration.body:
Hi {first_name},

{company}'s {recent_signal} tells me you're managing complexity across multiple teams — and the coordination overhead is usually the hidden cost that doesn't show up in any single department's budget.

We design multi-agent AI systems for Singapore {sector} companies that automate the handoffs between operations, finance, and customer teams — reducing coordination overhead by 40–60%.

Worth 15 minutes to show you what this looks like for a {sector} business at your stage?

Best,
Hon Mun
Aixer Solutions | hmchan@aixers.com

digital_transformation.trigger: Legacy systems; new leadership with tech mandate; digital transformation announcement
subject_variants: {company}'s digital transformation — where AI fits in
AI-first ops for {company} — not what you'd expect
digital_transformation.body:
Hi {first_name},

{recent_signal} at {company} signals a real appetite for change — and most transformation projects stall because they start with systems rather than outcomes.

We work with Singapore {sector} companies to deploy AI agents that show measurable results in 6–8 weeks, without the multi-year ERP commitment.

Open to a 15-minute call to share what's worked for similar-sized {sector} businesses here in Singapore?

Best,
Hon Mun
Aixer Solutions | hmchan@aixers.com
